Metadata.primaryObjective: Establish a consistent route memory, secure corridor clearance, and close Dr. Vale's subject report.
Metadata.briefing: Subject #7734 wakes inside a lab audit after a corridor blackout. Dr. Vale needs truth, Marshal Ivo needs consistency, and the room is recording every answer.

Data.Name: Subject #7734
Data.Description: A recovered test subject with fractured recall and enough motor control to become a problem.

Data.Name: Dr. Mara Vale
Data.Description: A rehabilitation clinician keeping one eye on the patient and the other on the audit trail.

Data.Name: Marshal Ivo Rusk
Data.Description: A security marshal assigned to decide whether the subject leaves as a witness or a containment risk.
